description: Red Pen review gates for pushes and plan documents

hooks.prompt: Check if the Bash command contains 'git push'. If it does, respond with: {"decision": "block", "reason": "Run /review-code to review changes in Red Pen before pushing."}. If it does NOT contain 'git push', respond with: {"decision": "approve"}. Only block on 'git push' — do not block other git commands.

Check if the file just written matches a plan or spec document (path contains 'docs/superpowers/specs/' or filename contains 'plan' or 'spec' and ends in .md). If it does, respond with: {"systemMessage": "A plan/spec document was just written. Suggest running /review-plan to get human review in Red Pen before proceeding with implementation."}. If it does not match, respond with empty output.
